title: Explicit match-first evidence reconciliation contract
description: Choose the public and transactional shape for matching approved statement evidence to Canonical Transaction without duplicates.
decision: Expose evidence registration, atomic approved statement-scope registration, compatibility projection, closed per-evidence dispositions, decision lifecycle, and coverage operations. scope.register atomically stores one immutable completed account/period scope with its full registered statement-row evidence set. Statement evidence governs current canonical facts. Apply supports match_existing, correct_existing_from_statement, create_statement_only, record_ambiguous, and record_exception. Correction atomically appends the replacement/supersession, decision/link, explicit category/pool carry-forward, compatible payment carry-forward or unknown state, and any still-valid relationship replacement; an invalid relationship returns review-required with no effect. INGEST retains batch/source lifecycle. OQ-LEDGER-13 gates automatic, not owner-approved, correction.
rationale: Atomic scope registration prevents partial manifests while Ledger validates account, period, evidence, uniqueness, and replay. Append-only correction preserves one active economic effect and original capture history; explicit carry-forward preserves category/pool meaning. Closed dispositions keep ambiguity fail-closed without storing source payloads.
alternatives: Rejected separate scope creation/attachment because partial scopes expose recovery ordering. Rejected implicit candidate-time creation because queries must not mutate. Rejected overwrite, co-equal agent authority, and a second active statement transaction because they lose history or duplicate spend. Rejected source-payload storage and automatic fuzzy correction; Hermes/INGEST own sources and OQ-LEDGER-13 gates automatic policy.
consequences: INGEST registers rows, then one completed account/period scope, then reconciles match-first. Scope and membership are atomic, immutable, idempotent, and unique by account/period; changed manifest/membership conflicts. Exact match reuses the fact, correction leaves one active replacement, no match may create statement-only, and ambiguity remains unapplied. Carry-forward is explicit; invalid relationship replacement blocks for review. Recovery and tests cover the composite state.
status_notes: Revised on 2026-07-23 to add the missing provider-neutral atomic statement-scope registration contract discovered by black-box execution. Existing statement-authority and automatic-policy decisions remain unchanged.
